name: Colorado Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients (sugar, flour, baking powder, and salt) together in a bowl.
2. Melt the chocolate and butter in a 9x9 dish and heat in the microwave oven at full power for 1 minute.
3. Add the dry ingredients alternately with milk to the melted chocolate-butter mixture, mixing gently by hand until well combined.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract.
5. Spread the batter evenly in a 9-inch square pan.
6. Scatter the topping ingredients (brown sugar, white sugar, cocoa, and cold coffee) on top of the batter in the order listed.
7. Microwave at full power for 4-5 minutes.
8. Let stand for 10 minutes.
-----TOPPING-----
1/2 cup Brown sugar
1/2 cup White sugar
4 tablespoons Cocoa
1 cup Cold coffee
Makes: 1 cake
Microwave time: 4-5 minutes
Conventional range time: 30 minutes at 350°F.
